commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: Death. Their injustice shall be punished.

commentaries.author: The Didache
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh The getting of treasures by a lying tongue is a vanity tossed to and fro of them that seek death. Do not be doubleminded or doubletongued, for a double tongue is a “deadly snare. ” Your words shall not be dishonest or hollow but substantiated by action. Do not be greedy or threatening or hypocritical or malicious or arrogant. Do not plot against your neighbor. Do not hate anybody. Reprove some, pray for others, and still others love more than your own life.
